title: mentha longifolia var. jurana
intro: Mentha longifolia var. jurana, also known as Japanese peppermint or Mentha japonica, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Mentha longifolia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. jurana include relief from digestive issues, reduction of stress and anxiety, and aid in respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
